ml-engineer.title: Python & Math Foundations
ml-engineer.description: ML is applied math in code. You need fluent Python and enough linear algebra, calculus, and statistics to understand why algorithms work — not just how to call them.
topics: Python — functions, classes, list comprehensions, generators
Linear algebra — vectors, matrices, dot product, eigenvalues
Statistics — mean, variance, normal distribution, Bayes' theorem
ml-engineer.challenge: Implement gradient descent from scratch in NumPy — fit a linear regression model to a synthetic dataset without using any ML library.

ml-engineer.title: Data Manipulation & EDA
ml-engineer.description: Real-world data is messy. Learn to load, clean, transform, and visualize data with Pandas and Matplotlib — skills you'll use in every single ML project.
topics: Pandas — DataFrames, Series, indexing, groupby, merge
Data cleaning — missing values, duplicates, outliers
EDA — correlation matrices, distributions, pair plots
ml-engineer.challenge: Pick a public Kaggle dataset, perform a full EDA — handle missing values, engineer 2+ new features, and produce 5 informative visualizations that reveal insights.

ml-engineer.title: Classical Machine Learning
ml-engineer.description: Before deep learning, master the classical algorithms. Linear regression, decision trees, ensembles — these still power most production ML systems and are faster to train and explain.
topics: Supervised learning — linear/logistic regression, decision trees, SVMs
Ensemble methods — Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost
Model evaluation — accuracy, precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC
ml-engineer.challenge: Enter a Kaggle tabular competition (e.g. Titanic or House Prices) — train at least 3 models, tune hyperparameters, and submit a solution that beats the baseline.

ml-engineer.title: Deep Learning with PyTorch
ml-engineer.description: PyTorch is the leading deep learning framework. Understand how neural networks learn, build architectures from scratch, and train models on GPU.
topics: Neural network anatomy — layers, activations, loss functions
Training loop — forward pass, loss, backward pass, optimizer step
CNNs — conv layers, pooling, feature maps
Transfer learning — torchvision pretrained models, fine-tuning

resources.label: fast.ai — Practical Deep Learning for Coders
Andrej Karpathy — Neural Networks: Zero to Hero

ml-engineer.challenge: Train a CNN image classifier on CIFAR-10 with PyTorch — implement the full training loop from scratch, achieve >85% accuracy, and visualize misclassified examples.

ml-engineer.title: NLP & Transformers
ml-engineer.description: NLP is one of the hottest areas in ML. Learn to work with text data, understand the Transformer architecture, and fine-tune pre-trained models with HuggingFace.
topics: Text preprocessing — tokenization, padding, special tokens
Word embeddings — Word2Vec, GloVe, contextual embeddings
ml-engineer.challenge: Fine-tune DistilBERT on a sentiment analysis dataset (SST-2 or your own), evaluate with F1, and expose it as a FastAPI endpoint.

ml-engineer.title: MLOps & Experiment Tracking
ml-engineer.description: Production ML is 90% engineering. Track experiments, version your data and models, and build reproducible pipelines so your team can collaborate on ML projects.
topics: MLflow — tracking, model registry, projects, artifacts
Weights & Biases — experiment tracking, hyperparameter sweeps
DVC — data versioning, pipelines, remote storage
ML pipelines with Prefect or Airflow
ml-engineer.challenge: Set up MLflow for your sentiment model — log all hyperparameters, metrics, and model artifacts. Use DVC to version the dataset, and run a W&B sweep to find the best learning rate.

ml-engineer.title: Model Deployment
ml-engineer.description: A model that isn't deployed doesn't deliver value. Package your model as a production REST API, optimize for inference speed, and deploy to the cloud.
topics: Model serving with FastAPI — async inference endpoint
Model optimization — ONNX export, quantization, pruning
A/B testing and shadow mode deployment

resources.label: Chip Huyen — Designing Machine Learning Systems (book)

ml-engineer.challenge: Deploy your fine-tuned sentiment model as a Dockerized FastAPI service — optimize with ONNX for 2x inference speedup, add a /health endpoint, and deploy to Fly.io.

ml-engineer.title: LLMs & Generative AI
ml-engineer.description: LLMs are reshaping what's possible in software. Learn to build AI-powered applications with LangChain, implement RAG for grounded generation, and work with vector databases.
topics: LLM APIs — OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, HuggingFace Inference
Prompt engineering — system prompts, few-shot, chain-of-thought
RAG — embeddings, vector databases (Chroma, Qdrant, Pinecone)
ml-engineer.challenge: Build a RAG-powered Q&A system over a set of PDF documents — chunk and embed the docs, store in Chroma, and build a FastAPI endpoint that answers questions with citations.

ml-engineer.title: Large-Scale Distributed Training
ml-engineer.description: Train large models efficiently across multiple GPUs and nodes using data parallelism, model parallelism, and ZeRO optimizer stages. Master mixed-precision training and gradient checkpointing to push throughput while staying within memory budgets.
topics: Data parallelism with DistributedDataParallel and FSDP
Model parallelism and pipeline parallelism strategies
Mixed-precision training with bfloat16 and fp16
Multi-node training with NCCL and RDMA networking
Profiling GPU utilization with PyTorch Profiler and Nsight

resources.label: Efficient Large-Scale Training - Hugging Face Course
Distributed Machine Learning Patterns by Yuan Tang

ml-engineer.challenge: Fine-tune a 7B parameter transformer on a multi-label classification task using DeepSpeed ZeRO-3 across two GPUs with bf16 mixed precision, log throughput (tokens per second) and peak memory usage per stage.

ml-engineer.title: Production ML Systems and Responsible AI
ml-engineer.description: Build robust production ML pipelines that include feature stores, automated retraining triggers, model governance workflows, and bias monitoring. Apply responsible AI practices including fairness auditing, explainability, and compliance documentation.
topics: Feature store design and online/offline serving with Feast
Model governance and approval workflows in MLflow
Automated retraining pipelines triggered by data drift
Data quality checks with Great Expectations in pipelines
Fairness metrics and bias auditing techniques
Model explainability with SHAP and LIME
ML compliance documentation and model cards

resources.label: Designing Machine Learning Systems by Chip Huyen

ml-engineer.challenge: Build a retraining pipeline that ingests features from Feast, detects distribution drift with Evidently, triggers a new MLflow experiment when drift exceeds a threshold, and generates a model card before promotion to production.

data-scientist.title: Python for Data Science
data-scientist.description: Python is the language of data science. Get fluent in the core language and the notebook workflow you'll use daily.
data-scientist.challenge: Write a notebook that loads a CSV, computes summary stats, and answers 5 questions about it.

data-scientist.title: NumPy & Pandas
data-scientist.description: Master the two libraries at the heart of data work. Vectorize computations with NumPy and wrangle tables with Pandas.
data-scientist.challenge: Use Pandas to clean and aggregate a real dataset into a tidy summary table.

data-scientist.title: Data Cleaning & Wrangling
data-scientist.description: Real data is messy. Learn to handle missing values, outliers and inconsistent formats to produce analysis-ready datasets.
data-scientist.challenge: Take a messy real-world dataset and turn it into a clean, documented, analysis-ready table.

data-scientist.title: EDA & Visualization
data-scientist.description: Understand your data before modeling. Explore distributions and relationships and communicate them with clear visuals.
data-scientist.challenge: Produce an EDA report with visuals that surfaces three non-obvious insights from a dataset.

data-scientist.title: Statistics & Probability
data-scientist.description: Statistics is the foundation of sound conclusions. Learn the concepts that separate real signal from noise.
data-scientist.challenge: Run an A/B test analysis: state hypotheses, test for significance, and report the conclusion.

data-scientist.title: SQL & Data Sources
data-scientist.description: Most data lives in databases. Learn to extract and join it with SQL and pull from APIs.
data-scientist.challenge: Query a database with window functions and join the result with data pulled from an API.

data-scientist.title: Machine Learning Foundations
data-scientist.description: Start predicting. Learn the core supervised learning algorithms with scikit-learn and how to apply them.
data-scientist.challenge: Train and compare three models on a dataset and report which performs best and why.

data-scientist.title: Model Evaluation & Features
data-scientist.description: Good models come from good features and honest evaluation. Learn to measure, tune and improve performance.
data-scientist.challenge: Improve a baseline model with feature engineering and tuning, documenting the metric gains.

data-scientist.title: Communicating Insights
data-scientist.description: An insight no one understands has no value. Learn to communicate findings to stakeholders clearly.
data-scientist.challenge: Turn an analysis into a Streamlit dashboard and a 5-slide narrative for stakeholders.

data-scientist.title: Capstone & Deployment
data-scientist.description: Bring it together. Run a full project from question to deployed model and a reproducible pipeline.
data-scientist.challenge: Ship an end-to-end project: clean data, train a model, track it, and serve predictions via an API.

ai-developer.title: Python & APIs for AI
ai-developer.description: AI developers glue models to applications. Get comfortable with Python and consuming HTTP APIs.
ai-developer.challenge: Build a Python script that calls an LLM API and handles errors, retries and token limits.

ai-developer.title: Working with LLM APIs
ai-developer.description: Learn the building blocks of LLM apps. Use chat completions, system prompts and streaming responses.
ai-developer.challenge: Build a streaming chat assistant with a custom system prompt and adjustable parameters.

ai-developer.title: Prompt Engineering for Developers
ai-developer.description: Get reliable results from models. Apply prompting techniques that make outputs accurate and parseable.
ai-developer.challenge: Design prompts that reliably return valid JSON for a structured extraction task.

ai-developer.title: LangChain Fundamentals
ai-developer.description: Compose LLM applications with LangChain. Build chains, manage prompts and add memory.
ai-developer.challenge: Build a multi-step chain that summarizes a document and answers follow-up questions with memory.

ai-developer.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
ai-developer.description: Ground LLMs in your own data. Build a RAG pipeline that retrieves relevant context before answering.
ai-developer.challenge: Build a RAG chatbot over a folder of PDFs that answers with citations to the source.

ai-developer.title: Embeddings & Vector Stores
ai-developer.description: Power semantic search and retrieval. Generate embeddings and store them in a vector database.
ai-developer.challenge: Index a knowledge base in a vector DB with metadata filtering and build a semantic search endpoint.

ai-developer.title: Building AI Agents & Tools
ai-developer.description: Let models take actions. Build agents that use tools, call functions and follow multi-step plans.
ai-developer.challenge: Build an agent that can search a database and call an external API to complete a task end to end.

ai-developer.title: Serving AI with FastAPI
ai-developer.description: Expose your AI features as a production API. Build endpoints with FastAPI, including streaming.
ai-developer.challenge: Wrap your RAG agent in a FastAPI service with a streaming chat endpoint and request validation.

ai-developer.title: Evaluation, Guardrails & Cost
ai-developer.description: Make AI apps reliable and affordable. Evaluate quality, add safety guardrails, and control cost.
ai-developer.challenge: Build an eval set for your RAG app, add input/output guardrails, and add a response cache.

ai-developer.title: Deployment & Observability
ai-developer.description: Ship and operate AI applications. Containerize, trace requests, and deploy with confidence.
ai-developer.challenge: Containerize your AI app, add request tracing and cost logging, and deploy it via CI.

nlp-engineer.title: NLP Foundations
nlp-engineer.description: Start with how machines process language. Understand the core tasks and challenges of natural language processing.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Build a simple text-stats tool that tokenizes a corpus and reports vocabulary and frequencies.

nlp-engineer.title: Text Preprocessing
nlp-engineer.description: Clean text is the foundation of NLP. Master tokenization, normalization and the preprocessing pipeline.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Build a reusable preprocessing pipeline and compare word-level vs subword tokenization.

nlp-engineer.title: Classical NLP
nlp-engineer.description: Before transformers, classical methods solved real problems — and still do. Learn the techniques and when they shine.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Build a TF-IDF + classifier pipeline for sentiment and compare it to a spaCy NER extractor.

nlp-engineer.title: Word Embeddings
nlp-engineer.description: Represent meaning as vectors. Learn how embeddings capture semantic relationships between words.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Train word embeddings on a corpus and explore the nearest neighbors and analogies they learn.

nlp-engineer.title: Deep Learning for NLP
nlp-engineer.description: Add neural networks to your toolkit. Build sequence models with PyTorch for language tasks.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Build and train an LSTM text classifier in PyTorch and evaluate it against a classical baseline.

nlp-engineer.title: Transformers & Attention
nlp-engineer.description: Understand the architecture that changed NLP. Learn self-attention and the transformer that powers modern models.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Implement scaled dot-product attention from scratch and explain each step.

nlp-engineer.title: Hugging Face Transformers
nlp-engineer.description: Use the de facto NLP library. Load pretrained models and run real tasks with the Transformers ecosystem.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Use pretrained models to build a multi-task demo: classification, NER and summarization.

nlp-engineer.title: Fine-Tuning & Transfer Learning
nlp-engineer.description: Adapt models to your domain. Fine-tune transformers efficiently with transfer learning and PEFT.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Fine-tune a transformer on a domain dataset with LoRA and beat the zero-shot baseline.

nlp-engineer.title: NLP Tasks in Production
nlp-engineer.description: Apply NLP to real product problems. Implement the high-value tasks teams actually ship.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Build a document QA system that retrieves passages and extracts precise answers.

nlp-engineer.title: Deployment & MLOps for NLP
nlp-engineer.description: Ship NLP models efficiently. Optimize, serve and monitor them in production.
nlp-engineer.challenge: Optimize your fine-tuned model with ONNX and serve it behind a FastAPI endpoint in Docker.

cv-engineer.title: Image Processing Foundations
cv-engineer.description: Computer vision starts with understanding images as data. Learn how pixels, channels and color spaces work.
cv-engineer.challenge: Load an image, convert color spaces, and apply thresholding to segment a simple object.

cv-engineer.title: OpenCV Essentials
cv-engineer.description: OpenCV is the workhorse of classical CV. Master the operations you'll use in every pipeline.
cv-engineer.challenge: Build a document scanner that detects edges, finds the page contour and warps it flat.

cv-engineer.title: Feature Detection & Classical CV
cv-engineer.description: Learn how classical CV finds and matches structure in images — the basis of tracking and stitching.
cv-engineer.challenge: Stitch two overlapping photos into a panorama using feature matching and homography.

cv-engineer.title: Deep Learning with PyTorch
cv-engineer.description: Modern CV is deep learning. Build the PyTorch foundation you'll use to train vision models.
cv-engineer.challenge: Train a small neural network on an image dataset in PyTorch with a proper training loop.

cv-engineer.title: Convolutional Neural Networks
cv-engineer.description: CNNs are the backbone of image models. Understand convolutions and the architectures that won ImageNet.
cv-engineer.challenge: Fine-tune a pretrained ResNet on a custom image dataset and report accuracy.

cv-engineer.title: Image Classification
cv-engineer.description: Master the canonical CV task. Build robust image classifiers with augmentation and solid evaluation.
cv-engineer.challenge: Build a classifier with augmentation that generalizes well, and analyze its mistakes.

cv-engineer.title: Object Detection
cv-engineer.description: Find and localize objects. Learn detection concepts and build real detectors with YOLO.
cv-engineer.challenge: Train a YOLO model on a custom dataset to detect a class of objects and measure its mAP.

cv-engineer.title: Segmentation & Advanced CV
cv-engineer.description: Go beyond boxes to pixel-level understanding. Learn semantic and instance segmentation.
cv-engineer.challenge: Build a semantic segmentation model that masks a target object class in images.

cv-engineer.title: Datasets, Augmentation & Training
cv-engineer.description: Great models need great data and disciplined training. Build datasets and reproducible training runs.
cv-engineer.challenge: Build and version a labeled dataset, then run tracked training experiments comparing augmentations.

cv-engineer.title: Deployment & Edge Inference
cv-engineer.description: Run vision models where they're needed. Optimize and deploy to servers and edge devices.
cv-engineer.challenge: Export your detector to ONNX and run real-time inference on a webcam stream.

llm-engineer.title: LLM Foundations
llm-engineer.description: Understand what large language models are and how they work at a practical level before building with them.
topics: How LLMs are trained & predict tokens
llm-engineer.challenge: Compare outputs of an open and a closed model on the same prompts and document the differences.

llm-engineer.title: Prompting & Context
llm-engineer.description: Prompting is the primary interface to LLMs. Learn to steer models reliably with context and examples.
llm-engineer.challenge: Design a prompt template with few-shot examples that produces consistent structured output.

llm-engineer.title: Embeddings & Vector Databases
llm-engineer.description: Retrieval is what makes LLMs useful on private data. Learn embeddings and vector search.
llm-engineer.challenge: Build an embedding index over a document set with chunking and metadata filtering.

llm-engineer.title: RAG Architecture
llm-engineer.description: Build retrieval-augmented generation systems that answer from your data with citations.
llm-engineer.challenge: Build a production-style RAG system with re-ranking and source citations over a knowledge base.

llm-engineer.title: LangChain & LlamaIndex
llm-engineer.description: Use the leading frameworks to compose LLM applications without reinventing the plumbing.
llm-engineer.challenge: Rebuild your RAG app with LlamaIndex query engines and trace it with LangSmith.

llm-engineer.title: Agents & Tool Use
llm-engineer.description: Give LLMs the ability to act. Build agents that plan, call tools and complete multi-step tasks.
llm-engineer.challenge: Build a tool-using agent with LangGraph that researches a topic and writes a sourced summary.

llm-engineer.title: Fine-Tuning & PEFT
llm-engineer.description: When prompting isn't enough, fine-tune. Learn efficient adaptation of open models to your needs.
llm-engineer.challenge: Fine-tune an open model with QLoRA on an instruction dataset and compare it to the base model.

llm-engineer.title: Evaluation & Observability
llm-engineer.description: You can't improve what you can't measure. Build evaluation and observability for LLM systems.
llm-engineer.challenge: Build an automated eval suite for your RAG agent with retrieval and answer-quality metrics.

llm-engineer.title: Optimization, Caching & Cost
llm-engineer.description: Make LLM apps fast and affordable. Optimize latency, cache aggressively and control token spend.
llm-engineer.challenge: Add semantic caching and model routing to cut your app's latency and cost measurably.

llm-engineer.title: Production Deployment & Safety
llm-engineer.description: Ship LLM systems responsibly. Deploy, guard against misuse, and monitor in production.
llm-engineer.challenge: Deploy your LLM app with guardrails and monitoring, and red-team it for prompt injection.

mlops.title: MLOps Foundations
mlops.description: MLOps brings engineering discipline to machine learning. Understand the lifecycle and why models fail in production.
topics: Why ML projects fail in production
mlops.challenge: Map an existing ML notebook project to the full ML lifecycle and identify the production gaps.

mlops.title: ML Lifecycle & Reproducibility
mlops.description: Reproducibility is the bedrock of MLOps. Version code, data and environments so results can be recreated.
mlops.challenge: Set up a reproducible ML project with Git + DVC where anyone can recreate your results.

mlops.title: Experiment Tracking
mlops.description: Track every experiment so you can compare and reproduce them. Make MLflow your model's source of truth.
mlops.challenge: Instrument a training script with MLflow and register the best run in the model registry.

mlops.title: Data & Feature Pipelines
mlops.description: Models are only as good as their data pipelines. Build reliable, validated feature pipelines.
topics: Handling data drift at the source
mlops.challenge: Build a validated feature pipeline and serve the same features for training and inference.

mlops.title: Model Packaging & Containers
mlops.description: Package models so they run anywhere. Containerize models and their dependencies reproducibly.
mlops.challenge: Package a trained model into a versioned Docker image that exposes a prediction endpoint.

mlops.title: Orchestration
mlops.description: Automate ML workflows end to end. Orchestrate training and data pipelines with Airflow and Kubeflow.
mlops.challenge: Build an Airflow DAG that runs the full pipeline: ingest, train, evaluate and register.

mlops.title: CI/CD for ML
mlops.description: Automate testing and delivery for ML. Build pipelines that validate data, code and models on every change.
mlops.challenge: Build a CI pipeline that tests the pipeline, validates a model, and blocks bad models from promotion.

mlops.title: Model Serving & Deployment
mlops.description: Get models into production. Serve predictions at scale with the right deployment pattern.
mlops.challenge: Deploy a model with autoscaling and run a canary rollout of a new version.

mlops.title: Monitoring & Drift Detection
mlops.description: Models degrade silently. Monitor predictions, detect drift, and know when to retrain.
mlops.challenge: Add drift detection and a monitoring dashboard that alerts when model inputs shift.

mlops.title: Scaling & Governance
mlops.description: Operate ML responsibly at scale. Manage infrastructure, governance and cost across many models.
mlops.challenge: Document a governance & cost plan for a multi-model platform with lineage and audit trails.

data-engineer.title: Data Engineering Foundations
data-engineer.description: Data engineers build the pipelines that power analytics and ML. Start with the fundamentals and the big picture.
data-engineer.challenge: Diagram an end-to-end data platform and explain where batch and streaming each fit.

data-engineer.title: SQL & Data Modeling
data-engineer.description: SQL and data modeling are the core craft. Learn to model data for analytics at scale.
data-engineer.challenge: Design a star schema for an analytics use case and write the SQL to populate it.

data-engineer.title: Python for Data Engineering
data-engineer.description: Python glues data systems together. Build ingestion scripts and transformations that move data reliably.
data-engineer.challenge: Build a Python ingestion job that pulls from an API and loads it into a warehouse table.

data-engineer.title: Batch Processing with Spark
data-engineer.description: Process data at scale. Learn distributed computing with Apache Spark for big batch jobs.
data-engineer.challenge: Write a PySpark job that processes a large dataset and writes partitioned Parquet output.

data-engineer.title: Streaming with Kafka
data-engineer.description: Handle data in motion. Build real-time pipelines with Apache Kafka and stream processing.
data-engineer.challenge: Build a streaming pipeline that ingests events through Kafka and writes aggregates downstream.

data-engineer.title: Orchestration with Airflow
data-engineer.description: Coordinate complex pipelines. Schedule, monitor and retry workflows with Apache Airflow.
data-engineer.challenge: Orchestrate ingest → transform → load as an Airflow DAG with retries and alerting.

data-engineer.title: Data Warehousing & dbt
data-engineer.description: Transform data where it lives. Use dbt to build tested, documented, version-controlled transformations.
data-engineer.challenge: Build a dbt project with staging and mart models, tests and generated documentation.

data-engineer.title: Data Lakes & Lakehouse
data-engineer.description: Store everything affordably and query it flexibly. Learn data lake and lakehouse architectures.
data-engineer.challenge: Build a lakehouse table with Delta or Iceberg and demonstrate schema evolution and time travel.

data-engineer.title: Data Quality & Governance
data-engineer.description: Trustworthy data needs quality and governance. Add validation, lineage and cataloging to your pipelines.
data-engineer.challenge: Add data quality tests and a data contract to a pipeline, surfacing failures before they spread.

data-engineer.title: Deployment & Scaling
data-engineer.description: Run data platforms in production. Containerize, provision infrastructure as code, and scale.
data-engineer.challenge: Provision a cloud data pipeline with Terraform and deploy it via CI with cost monitoring.

rl-engineer.title: RL Foundations
rl-engineer.description: Reinforcement learning teaches agents through trial and error. Learn the framework and where RL fits.
topics: The RL problem vs supervised learning
rl-engineer.challenge: Formalize a simple game as an MDP: define its states, actions and reward function.

rl-engineer.title: Markov Decision Processes
rl-engineer.description: MDPs are the mathematical core of RL. Master states, actions, policies and value functions.
rl-engineer.challenge: Implement value iteration to solve a small gridworld MDP and visualize the optimal policy.

rl-engineer.title: Dynamic Programming & Monte Carlo
rl-engineer.description: Learn the classical solution methods. Use dynamic programming and Monte Carlo to estimate values.
rl-engineer.challenge: Solve a gridworld with both policy iteration and Monte Carlo control and compare them.

rl-engineer.title: Temporal-Difference & Q-Learning
rl-engineer.description: TD learning combines the best of DP and Monte Carlo. Build tabular Q-learning agents.
rl-engineer.challenge: Implement Q-learning from scratch and train it to solve the Taxi or FrozenLake environment.

rl-engineer.title: Deep Q-Networks
rl-engineer.description: Scale RL with neural networks. Build DQN agents that learn from high-dimensional states.
rl-engineer.challenge: Build a DQN in PyTorch with replay and target networks to play a classic control environment.

rl-engineer.title: Policy Gradient Methods
rl-engineer.description: Optimize policies directly. Learn policy gradient methods for continuous and stochastic control.
rl-engineer.challenge: Implement REINFORCE with a baseline and train it on a continuous control task.

rl-engineer.title: Actor-Critic & PPO
rl-engineer.description: Combine value and policy learning. Master the actor-critic family and PPO, the modern workhorse.
rl-engineer.challenge: Train a PPO agent to solve a continuous control environment and tune it to a target reward.

rl-engineer.title: Environments with Gymnasium
rl-engineer.description: Standardize your RL workflow. Use Gymnasium environments and build custom ones for your problems.
rl-engineer.challenge: Build a custom Gymnasium environment for a toy problem and train an agent to solve it.

rl-engineer.title: Scaling RL with Ray RLlib
rl-engineer.description: Train serious RL at scale. Use Ray RLlib to run distributed training across many workers.
rl-engineer.challenge: Train a PPO agent with RLlib across multiple workers and tune it with Ray Tune.

rl-engineer.title: Applications & Deployment
rl-engineer.description: Take RL from notebook to product. Learn real-world applications and how to deploy trained policies.
rl-engineer.challenge: Export a trained policy and serve it behind an API that returns actions for given observations.

prompt-engineer.title: LLM & Prompting Foundations
prompt-engineer.description: Effective prompting starts with understanding how models work. Build the mental model behind every good prompt.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Take one task and show how temperature and phrasing change the model's output quality.

prompt-engineer.title: Core Prompting Techniques
prompt-engineer.description: Learn the techniques that reliably improve outputs. These are the bread and butter of prompt engineering.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Improve a weak prompt through five iterations, documenting the gain at each step.

prompt-engineer.title: Advanced Prompting
prompt-engineer.description: Unlock reasoning. Apply advanced techniques that help models tackle complex, multi-step problems.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Use chain-of-thought and self-consistency to boost accuracy on a reasoning task.

prompt-engineer.title: Structured Outputs & Function Calling
prompt-engineer.description: Make outputs machine-readable. Get reliable JSON and tool calls that integrate into real apps.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Design prompts and schemas that reliably extract structured data from messy text.

prompt-engineer.title: RAG for Grounded Answers
prompt-engineer.description: Ground responses in real data. Learn how retrieval changes prompting and how to prompt over context.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Write prompts for a RAG system that answer strictly from context and say 'I don't know' when needed.

prompt-engineer.title: Prompt Chaining & Workflows
prompt-engineer.description: Compose prompts into pipelines. Break complex tasks into chained steps with LangChain.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Build a multi-step prompt chain that drafts, critiques and revises a piece of writing.

prompt-engineer.title: Evaluation & Testing Prompts
prompt-engineer.description: Prompts need testing like code. Build evaluation sets and measure whether changes actually help.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Create an eval set and use LLM-as-judge to compare two prompt versions objectively.

prompt-engineer.title: Guardrails & Safety
prompt-engineer.description: Make prompt systems safe. Defend against prompt injection and keep outputs within bounds.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Red-team your own prompt system for injection, then add guardrails that stop the attacks.

prompt-engineer.title: Optimization & Cost Control
prompt-engineer.description: Great prompts are also efficient. Reduce tokens, latency and cost without losing quality.
topics: Choosing the right model per task
prompt-engineer.challenge: Cut the token cost of a working prompt system by 40% while holding quality steady on your evals.

prompt-engineer.title: Productionizing Prompt Systems
prompt-engineer.description: Operate prompts at scale. Version, deploy and monitor prompt systems like real software.
prompt-engineer.challenge: Set up versioned prompts with production monitoring and a safe rollout process for changes.
